name: checkboxes-impl
description: A real-time collaborative checkbox grid supporting 1 million checkboxes (scalable to 1 billion) using SpacetimeDB 0.1 backend and vanilla WASM frontend.

scripts.test: echo 'Available test commands:' && echo '  npm run test:smoke   # Quick smoke tests only' && echo '  npm run test:e2e     # Full E2E test suite' && echo '  npm run test:full    # Complete test suite'
